<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Doreen Sasaka — Product Leader</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Bricolage+Grotesque:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
:root{
  --black:#0a0a0a;
  --white:#f5f2ed;
  --orange:#ff4500;
  --gray:#888;
  --border:2px solid var(--black);
  --border-thick:4px solid var(--black);
  --border-thin:1px solid var(--black);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--white);color:var(--black);font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;}

/* ── UTILITY ── */
.mono{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;}
.orange{color:var(--orange);}
.label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;background:var(--white);border-bottom:var(--border-thick);display:flex;align-items:stretch;overflow:hidden;}
.nav-brand{padding:16px 28px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;border-right:var(--border-thick);flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;}
.nav-brand span{color:var(--orange);}
.nav-links{display:flex;list-style:none;margin-left:auto;}
.nav-links li{border-left:var(--border-thin);}
.nav-links a{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 22px;height:100%;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--black);text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,color .15s;}
.nav-links a:hover{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);}
.nav-tag{padding:16px 28px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;background:var(--orange);color:#fff;border-left:var(--border-thick);display:flex;align-items:center;}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{min-height:100vh;border-bottom:var(--border-thick);display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr auto;}
.hero-top{border-bottom:var(--border-thick);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;padding:0;}
.hero-top-left{padding:48px;border-right:var(--border-thick);}
.hero-eyebrow{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:20px;}
.hero-h1{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(96px,14vw,200px);line-height:.88;letter-spacing:-.01em;margin-bottom:0;}
.hero-h1-sub{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(96px,14vw,200px);line-height:.88;color:var(--orange);}
.hero-top-right{padding:48px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;}
.hero-desc{font-size:18px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.65;color:#2a2a2a;max-width:480px;margin-bottom:40px;}
.hero-desc strong{font-weight:800;color:var(--black);}
.hero-actions{display:flex;gap:0;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn-primary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:16px 32px;background:var(--black);color:var(--white);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;border:var(--border-thick);transition:background .15s,color .15s;margin-right:-4px;}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--orange);border-color:var(--orange);}
.btn-secondary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:16px 32px;background:var(--white);color:var(--black);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;border:var(--border-thick);transition:background .15s,color .15s;}
.btn-secondary:hover{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);}
.hero-email{margin-top:20px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);}
.hero-email a{color:var(--orange);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--orange);}

/* HERO STATS */
.hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);border-top:var(--border-thick);}
.hstat{padding:36px 40px;border-right:var(--border-thick);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.hstat:last-child{border-right:none;}
.hstat-num{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:72px;line-height:1;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:8px;}
.hstat-lbl{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--black);margin-bottom:4px;}
.hstat-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);}

/* HERO TICKER */
.ticker{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);padding:14px 0;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;border-bottom:var(--border-thick);}
.ticker-inner{display:inline-flex;animation:tick 28s linear infinite;}
.ticker-inner span{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:0 40px;}
.ticker-inner span.sep{color:var(--orange);}
@keyframes tick{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* ── SECTION STRUCTURE ── */
.section{border-bottom:var(--border-thick);}
.section-header{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto;align-items:center;border-bottom:var(--border-thick);padding:0;}
.section-num{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:80px;line-height:1;padding:20px 32px;border-right:var(--border-thick);color:rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
.section-title{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:64px;line-height:1;padding:20px 40px;letter-spacing:.01em;}
.section-label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:20px 32px;border-left:var(--border-thick);color:var(--orange);}

/* ── VISION ── */
#vision .section-title{color:var(--orange);}
.vision-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
.vision-left{padding:64px;border-right:var(--border-thick);}
.vision-quote{font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque',sans-serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:36px;padding-bottom:36px;border-bottom:var(--border-thick);}
.vision-text{font-size:16px;line-height:1.85;color:#2a2a2a;margin-bottom:24px;}
.vision-text strong{font-weight:800;color:var(--black);}
.vision-right{padding:0;}
.step{border-bottom:var(--border-thick);padding:36px 48px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:60px 1fr;gap:28px;align-items:start;transition:background .15s;}
.step:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.step:hover{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);}
.step:hover .step-num{color:var(--orange);}
.step:hover .step-body{color:rgba(245,242,237,.65);}
.step-num{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:56px;line-height:1;color:rgba(0,0,0,.12);padding-top:4px;}
.step-title{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;}
.step-body{font-size:14px;line-height:1.75;color:#3a3a3a;}
.step-body strong{color:var(--orange);}
.step:hover .step-body strong{color:var(--orange);}
.vision-payoff{background:var(--orange);padding:48px;color:#fff;border-top:var(--border-thick);}
.payoff-label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.7;margin-bottom:16px;}
.payoff-text{font-size:18px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.65;}
.payoff-text strong{font-weight:800;}

/* ── SHIPS CODE ── */
.ships-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
.ships-intro{padding:64px;border-right:var(--border-thick);}
.ships-pull{font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.45;margin-bottom:28px;padding-bottom:28px;border-bottom:var(--border-thick);}
.ships-text{font-size:16px;line-height:1.85;color:#2a2a2a;margin-bottom:16px;}
.ships-text strong{font-weight:800;}
.ships-cards{padding:0;}
.live-card{border-bottom:var(--border-thick);padding:48px;position:relative;transition:background .15s;}
.live-card:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.live-card:hover{background:#0a0a0a;}
.live-card:hover .live-name,.live-card:hover .live-sub,.live-card:hover .live-desc{color:var(--white);}
.live-card:hover .live-feat{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);}
.live-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:16px;}
.live-dot{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--orange);border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
.live-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:44px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:6px;}
.live-sub{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:20px;letter-spacing:.06em;}
.live-desc{font-size:14px;line-height:1.75;color:#3a3a3a;margin-bottom:24px;}
.live-stats{display:flex;gap:40px;margin-bottom:24px;padding-bottom:24px;border-bottom:var(--border-thin);}
.ls-val{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:40px;line-height:1;color:var(--orange);display:block;}
.ls-lbl{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gray);}
.live-feats{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.live-feat{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 10px;border:var(--border-thin);color:var(--gray);}
.live-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:2px solid var(--orange);padding-bottom:2px;transition:gap .2s;}
.live-link:hover{gap:14px;}

/* ── FIT ── */
.fit-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
.fit-card{padding:56px 52px;border-right:var(--border-thick);border-bottom:var(--border-thick);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .2s;}
.fit-card:nth-child(2n){border-right:none;}
.fit-card:nth-child(n+3){border-bottom:none;}
.fit-card:hover{background:var(--black);}
.fit-card:hover .wave-trait,.fit-card:hover .proof-txt,.fit-card:hover .proof-lbl{color:var(--white);}
.fit-card:hover .wave-lbl{color:rgba(255,69,0,.7);}
.fit-card:hover .fit-divider{background:var(--orange);}
.wave-lbl{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:10px;}
.wave-trait{font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:24px;}
.fit-divider{width:32px;height:3px;background:var(--black);margin-bottom:24px;transition:background .2s;}
.proof-lbl{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:12px;}
.proof-txt{font-size:15px;line-height:1.75;color:#2a2a2a;}
.proof-txt strong{font-weight:800;color:var(--black);}
.fit-card:hover .proof-txt strong{color:var(--orange);}

/* ── PRODUCTS ── */
.p-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
.p-card{padding:56px 52px;border-right:var(--border-thick);border-bottom:var(--border-thick);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .2s;}
.p-card:nth-child(2n){border-right:none;}
.p-card:nth-child(n+3){border-bottom:none;}
.p-card:hover{background:var(--orange);}
.p-card:hover .p-num-bg,.p-card:hover .p-tag,.p-card:hover .p-name,.p-card:hover .p-role,.p-card:hover .p-desc{color:var(--white);}
.p-card:hover .p-out li{color:var(--white);}
.p-card:hover .p-out li::before{color:var(--white);}
.p-card:hover .p-out li strong{color:var(--white);}
.p-num-bg{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:180px;position:absolute;top:-20px;right:16px;line-height:1;color:rgba(0,0,0,.04);pointer-events:none;transition:color .2s;}
.p-tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:color .2s;}
.p-tag::before{content:'';display:block;width:20px;height:2px;background:currentColor;}
.p-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:48px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:8px;}
.p-role{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:28px;letter-spacing:.06em;}
.p-desc{font-size:15px;line-height:1.75;color:#2a2a2a;margin-bottom:28px;}
.p-out{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.p-out li{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:12px;font-size:14px;color:#2a2a2a;}
.p-out li::before{content:'→';color:var(--orange);font-weight:700;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0;}
.p-out li strong{font-weight:800;color:var(--black);}

/* ── FIELD / PHOTOS ── */
#field{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);}
#field .section-header{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
#field .section-num{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);color:rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
#field .section-label{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
#field .section-title{color:var(--white);}
.field-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;border-top:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.field-left{padding:64px;border-right:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.field-intro{font-size:17px;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-bottom:40px;}
.field-pull{font-size:24px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.4;color:var(--white);padding-left:24px;border-left:3px solid var(--orange);margin-bottom:48px;}
.f-story{padding:28px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.f-story:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.f-loc{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:10px;}
.f-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;}
.f-body{font-size:13px;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);}
.field-right{display:grid;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;gap:0;}
.photo-frame{position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-bottom:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.photo-frame:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.photo-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;filter:grayscale(20%) contrast(1.05);transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),filter .5s;}
.photo-frame:hover img{transform:scale(1.04);filter:grayscale(0%) contrast(1.1);}
.photo-cap{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:20px 24px;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,.75));font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);}

/* PHOTO GRID - full width under field */
.photo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr;border-top:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.pgrid-frame{position:relative;overflow:hidden;height:320px;border-right:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.pgrid-frame:last-child{border-right:none;}
.pgrid-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:grayscale(30%) contrast(1.05);transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),filter .5s;}
.pgrid-frame:hover img{transform:scale(1.05);filter:grayscale(0%);}
.pgrid-cap{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:16px 20px;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,.8));font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);}

/* ── IMPACT ── */
#impact{background:var(--orange);}
#impact .section-header{border-color:#cc3600;background:var(--orange);}
#impact .section-num{border-color:#cc3600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
#impact .section-title{color:#fff;}
#impact .section-label{border-color:#cc3600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);}
.impact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);border-top:4px solid #cc3600;}
.istat{padding:44px 36px;border-right:4px solid #cc3600;text-align:center;transition:background .15s,transform .2s;}
.istat:last-child{border-right:none;}
.istat:hover{background:rgba(0,0,0,.1);}
.istat-num{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:72px;line-height:1;color:#fff;margin-bottom:12px;transition:transform .3s;}
.istat:hover .istat-num{transform:scale(1.08);}
.hstat-num{transition:color .3s;}
.hstat:hover .hstat-num{color:var(--black);}
.istat-lbl{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);}

/* ── AWARDS ── */
.awards-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;}
.award-card{padding:48px 44px;border-right:var(--border-thick);border-bottom:var(--border-thick);transition:background .2s;}
.award-card:nth-child(3n){border-right:none;}
.award-card.featured{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);}
.award-card.featured .a-org{color:var(--orange);}
.award-card.featured .a-desc{color:rgba(245,242,237,.55);}
.award-card:not(.featured):hover{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);}
.award-card:not(.featured):hover .a-org{color:var(--orange);}
.award-card:not(.featured):hover .a-desc{color:rgba(245,242,237,.55);}
.a-icon{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:20px;display:block;}
.a-title{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:32px;line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:10px;}
.a-org{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:14px;}
.a-desc{font-size:13px;line-height:1.65;color:var(--gray);}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
#contact{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);}
.contact-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;border-top:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.contact-left{padding:80px 64px;border-right:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.contact-h{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(72px,9vw,130px);line-height:.88;margin-bottom:32px;}
.contact-h em{font-style:normal;color:var(--orange);}
.contact-sub{font-size:17px;line-height:1.75;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin-bottom:48px;}
.contact-actions{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;max-width:360px;}
.cb-primary{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:20px 28px;background:var(--orange);color:#fff;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;border:2px solid var(--orange);margin-bottom:-2px;transition:background .15s;}
.cb-primary:hover{background:#cc3600;border-color:#cc3600;}
.cb-secondary{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:20px 28px;background:transparent;color:var(--white);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);transition:border-color .15s,background .15s;}
.cb-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--orange);color:var(--orange);}
.contact-right{padding:80px 64px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;}
.contact-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;}
.c-info-row{padding:24px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.c-info-label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);}
.c-info-val{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);}
.c-info-val a{color:var(--orange);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3);}
.c-info-val a:hover{border-color:var(--orange);}
.contact-foot{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);padding-top:40px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);}

/* ── REVEAL ANIMATIONS ── */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);transition:opacity .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none;}
.reveal-left{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-16px);transition:opacity .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
.reveal-left.visible{opacity:1;transform:none;}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media(max-width:900px){
  .hero-top,.vision-body,.ships-body,.fit-grid,.p-grid,.field-body,.contact-body{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .hero-top-left,.vision-left,.ships-intro,.field-left,.contact-left{border-right:none;border-bottom:var(--border-thick);}
  .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .hstat:nth-child(2n){border-right:none;}
  .impact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .awards-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .photo-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .pgrid-frame{border-right:none;border-bottom:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
  nav{flex-wrap:wrap;} .nav-links{display:none;}
  .section-title{font-size:48px;} .section-num{font-size:56px;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <span class="nav-brand">Doreen <span>Sasaka</span></span>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#vision">Wave Vision</a></li>
    <li><a href="#ships">Live Work</a></li>
    <li><a href="#fit">Why Me</a></li>
    <li><a href="#products">Products</a></li>
    <li><a href="#field">Field</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Connect</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav-tag">Open to Work</div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-top">
    <div class="hero-top-left">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">Senior Product Manager · Nairobi, Kenya</div>
      <div class="hero-h1">DOREEN</div>
      <div class="hero-h1-sub">SASAKA</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-top-right">
      <div>
        <p class="hero-desc">9+ years building <strong>fintech products across Africa</strong> — mobile money integrations serving 4M+ farmers, fraud prevention protecting $200M+ in annual payment flows. I build from first principles, go where the users are, and own outcomes end-to-end.</p>
        <div class="hero-actions">
          <a href="#vision" class="btn-primary">Wave Vision →</a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/doreen-sasaka-1ab3a796/" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary">LinkedIn ↗</a>
          <a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1AGIPQ9iBj0y1OGN81f-u-AmjqCmrUlqd/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary">CV ↓</a>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-email">📧 <a id="hero-email" href="#"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="e0938193818b81d4a0878d81898cce838f8d">[email&#160;protected]</span></a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STATS -->
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="hstat reveal">
      <div class="hstat-num">4M+</div>
      <div class="hstat-lbl">Farmers Served</div>
      <div class="hstat-sub">across 10 African countries</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hstat reveal">
      <div class="hstat-num">$200M</div>
      <div class="hstat-lbl">Payments Managed</div>
      <div class="hstat-sub">annually via M-Pesa, MTN, Airtel</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hstat reveal">
      <div class="hstat-num">23→96%</div>
      <div class="hstat-lbl">Order Completion</div>
      <div class="hstat-sub">from broken to best-in-class</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hstat reveal">
      <div class="hstat-num">90%</div>
      <div class="hstat-lbl">Loan Repayment Rate</div>
      <div class="hstat-sub">via eligibility workflow I defined</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TICKER -->
  <div class="ticker">
    <div class="ticker-inner">
      <span>Founder Mindset</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Agent-Led Growth</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Field Research</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>M-Pesa Integration</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Fraud Prevention</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Odoo · Keycloak · Jira</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Smallholder Finance</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>West Africa Fintech</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>MVP to Scale</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Founder Mindset</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Agent-Led Growth</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Field Research</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>M-Pesa Integration</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Fraud Prevention</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Odoo · Keycloak · Jira</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>Smallholder Finance</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>West Africa Fintech</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
      <span>MVP to Scale</span><span class="sep">◆</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- VISION -->
<section class="section" id="vision">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-num">01</div>
    <div class="section-title">THE AGENT IS THE PRODUCT</div>
    <div class="section-label">Wave Vision</div>
  </div>
  <div class="vision-body">
    <div class="vision-left reveal-left">
      <p class="vision-quote">"Wave's 150,000 agents aren't a distribution channel — they are the product. The moment their experience becomes seamless, client trust and growth follow as a natural consequence."</p>
      <p class="vision-text">Across Senegal, Côte d'Ivoire, and Uganda, <strong>most users' experience of Wave is mediated through an agent</strong> — not the app. An agent who struggles to onboard, gets confused by a new feature, or loses a transaction doesn't just lose that transaction. They erode the client's trust in Wave entirely.</p>
      <p class="vision-text">I've lived this problem directly. At One Acre Fund, our shop agents had a <strong>4.7/10 trust score</strong> in our POS system. Transactions failed daily. The real issue was simple: <strong>we had never understood what the agent's day actually looked like.</strong> When we fixed that, everything else improved. That is exactly where I'd start at Wave.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="vision-right">
      <div class="step reveal">
        <div class="step-num">01</div>
        <div>
          <div class="step-title">Deep Agent Discovery</div>
          <p class="step-body">Run structured user discovery across Wave's key markets. Map the full agent workflow end-to-end: onboarding friction, feature adoption gaps, transaction failure points, and <strong>the exact moments where fraud finds its opening</strong>. Not a survey — observation, interviews, ride-alongs.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="step reveal">
        <div class="step-num">02</div>
        <div>
          <div class="step-title">Frictionless Onboarding & Feature Rollout</div>
          <p class="step-body">New agents and new features should feel effortless to absorb. Define an onboarding flow and in-app training that gets agents productive fast — <strong>closing the window of uncertainty where mistakes and fraud are most likely</strong>.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="step reveal">
        <div class="step-num">03</div>
        <div>
          <div class="step-title">Close Fraud Gaps at the Workflow Level</div>
          <p class="step-body">Fraud happens in the gaps between steps — when an agent is rushed or outside their normal flow. Map those friction points and <strong>reduce the opportunity surface through smarter UX</strong>, not just back-end detection.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="step reveal">
        <div class="step-num">04</div>
        <div>
          <div class="step-title">Measure Trust — Not Just Transactions</div>
          <p class="step-body">Define an agent satisfaction and client trust metric feeding directly into expansion decisions. <strong>If clients love their agent, growth into new markets becomes a natural consequence</strong> of the foundation you've built.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="vision-payoff reveal">
        <div class="payoff-label">The Outcome</div>
        <p class="payoff-text">Agents who are confident, well-equipped, and operating with minimal friction become Wave's most powerful growth engine. <strong>Client trust in Wave is built one agent interaction at a time.</strong> Get that right, and expansion into Cameroon, new demographics, savings and credit products becomes a natural byproduct.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SHIPS CODE -->
<section class="section" id="ships">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-num">02</div>
    <div class="section-title">I DON'T WAIT FOR ENGINEERS</div>
    <div class="section-label">Live Work</div>
  </div>
  <div class="ships-body">
    <div class="ships-intro reveal-left">
      <p class="ships-pull">"The fastest way to get feedback on a product idea isn't a PRD — it's a working prototype you can put in someone's hands today."</p>
      <p class="ships-text">When I want to test a product direction, <strong>I build it myself.</strong> I write the code, deploy it to GitHub Pages, and share a live link for immediate feedback from real users and stakeholders.</p>
      <p class="ships-text">This is how I work: product instinct + technical execution + fast feedback loop. It's how I shipped <strong>Tupande Online in 8 months</strong>, and how I tested the Acre Point POS UX before a single engineer wrote production code.</p>
      <p class="ships-text" style="margin-top:24px;padding-top:24px;border-top:var(--border-thick);">Wave PMs work without a speed limit. <strong>This is what that looks like in practice.</strong></p>
    </div>
    <div class="ships-cards">
      <div class="live-card reveal">
        <div class="live-badge"><span class="live-dot"></span>Live Prototype</div>
        <div class="live-name">Acrepoint POS</div>
        <div class="live-sub">Built & deployed by Doreen · GitHub Pages · v1.0.4</div>
        <p class="live-desc">A fully working POS prototype I built and shipped myself to test agent workflows before committing to production. Includes an Impact Dashboard, M-Pesa / cash checkout, inventory risk alerts, digital reservation management, and manual sales audit trail.</p>
        <div class="live-stats">
          <div><span class="ls-val">5+</span><span class="ls-lbl">Live Screens</span></div>
          <div><span class="ls-val">M-Pesa</span><span class="ls-lbl">Integrated</span></div>
          <div><span class="ls-val">0</span><span class="ls-lbl">Days Waiting</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="live-feats">
          <span class="live-feat">Impact Dashboard</span><span class="live-feat">M-Pesa Checkout</span>
          <span class="live-feat">Inventory Alerts</span><span class="live-feat">Reservations</span>
          <span class="live-feat">Manual Audit</span>
        </div>
        <a href="https://deeoaf.github.io/acrepoint-prototype/" target="_blank" class="live-link">View Live Prototype →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="live-card reveal">
        <div class="live-badge"><span class="live-dot"></span>Production App · Play Store</div>
        <div class="live-name">Tupande Online</div>
        <div class="live-sub">One Acre Fund · Android · Last updated Feb 2026</div>
        <p class="live-desc">The production app I took from problem framing to launch. Mobile-first ordering for rural Kenyan farmers — locate nearest duka, browse inputs, and pay via mobile money. Designed for users with zero prior e-commerce experience.</p>
        <div class="live-stats">
          <div><span class="ls-val">100K+</span><span class="ls-lbl">Downloads</span></div>
          <div><span class="ls-val">4.3★</span><span class="ls-lbl">Rating</span></div>
          <div><span class="ls-val">1K+</span><span class="ls-lbl">Reviews</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="live-feats">
          <span class="live-feat">M-Pesa Checkout</span><span class="live-feat">Duka Locator</span>
          <span class="live-feat">Real-time Updates</span><span class="live-feat">Swahili UX</span>
        </div>
        <a href="https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.oneacrefund.clientapp&hl=en" target="_blank" class="live-link">View on Play Store →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FIT -->
<section class="section" id="fit">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-num">03</div>
    <div class="section-title">BUILT FOR HOW WAVE WORKS</div>
    <div class="section-label">Why Me</div>
  </div>
  <div class="fit-grid">
    <div class="fit-card reveal">
      <div class="wave-lbl">Wave looks for</div>
      <div class="wave-trait">PMs who lead like founders. Set own goals. Own the direction.</div>
      <div class="fit-divider"></div>
      <div class="proof-lbl">Doreen's proof</div>
      <p class="proof-txt">I pioneered One Acre Fund's <strong>PRD framework from scratch</strong> — no template, no playbook. When our POS was failing agents, I built the executive business case, ran a 197-person survey, and drove the engineering warroom. <strong>I don't wait to be pointed at problems.</strong></p>
    </div>
    <div class="fit-card reveal">
      <div class="wave-lbl">Wave looks for</div>
      <div class="wave-trait">Optimize for learning. Ship MVPs. Maximize learning per unit of effort.</div>
      <div class="fit-divider"></div>
      <div class="proof-lbl">Doreen's proof</div>
      <p class="proof-txt">Launched <strong>Tupande Online in 8 months</strong> — started lean, measured constantly, iterated fast. Hit 30K users and $70K revenue. When order completion was at 23%, I isolated the riskiest drop-off points first. It hit <strong>96%.</strong></p>
    </div>
    <div class="fit-card reveal">
      <div class="wave-lbl">Wave looks for</div>
      <div class="wave-trait">Overreach. Act like a mini-GM. Do whatever the outcome requires.</div>
      <div class="fit-divider"></div>
      <div class="proof-lbl">Doreen's proof</div>
      <p class="proof-txt">At IBM I ran operations across <strong>20+ African markets</strong>. At One Acre Fund, when Odoo degradation was crippling agents pre-harvest, I didn't file a ticket — I built an executive escalation case and pushed for a dedicated warroom. <strong>I find another path.</strong></p>
    </div>
    <div class="fit-card reveal">
      <div class="wave-lbl">Wave looks for</div>
      <div class="wave-trait">Meet users where they are. Travel. Observe daily routines firsthand.</div>
      <div class="fit-divider"></div>
      <div class="proof-lbl">Doreen's proof</div>
      <p class="proof-txt">My users are <strong>smallholder farmers in rural Kenya</strong> — feature phones, no prior fintech experience, intermittent connectivity. I do field visits regularly. The Acre Point UX was shaped by <strong>watching agents handle M-Pesa transactions under peak-season pressure</strong> — not from a boardroom.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PRODUCTS -->
<section class="section" id="products">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-num">04</div>
    <div class="section-title">OWNED END-TO-END</div>
    <div class="section-label">Products</div>
  </div>
  <div class="p-grid">
    <div class="p-card reveal">
      <div class="p-num-bg">01</div>
      <div class="p-tag">E-commerce · Fintech</div>
      <div class="p-name">Tupande Online</div>
      <div class="p-role">Lead PM — Full Product Lifecycle</div>
      <p class="p-desc">Farmers in rural Kenya needed to order inputs digitally — without bank accounts, reliable data, or prior e-commerce experience. I defined the problem from first principles, wrote the specs, drove UX decisions, and shipped in 8 months.</p>
      <ul class="p-out">
        <li><strong>30,000</strong> active users acquired</li>
        <li><strong>$70,000</strong> revenue in first 8 months</li>
        <li>Order completion <strong>23% → 96%</strong></li>
        <li>Won <strong>Top Agriculture App</strong> award</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="p-card reveal">
      <div class="p-num-bg">02</div>
      <div class="p-tag">POS · Payments · Fraud</div>
      <div class="p-name">Acre Point POS</div>
      <div class="p-role">Lead PM — Research through Prototyping</div>
      <p class="p-desc">Agent trust score was 4.7/10. Transaction failures were daily. I surveyed 197 users, identified the failure modes in their actual workflows, and defined a new agent-optimised POS with M-Pesa integration and in-session fraud detection.</p>
      <ul class="p-out">
        <li><strong>197-person</strong> field survey uncovered trust crisis</li>
        <li>Fraud prevention on <strong>$200M+</strong> in payment flows</li>
        <li>Full product epics with <strong>detailed acceptance criteria</strong></li>
        <li>Executive dashboard tracking <strong>deployment readiness</strong></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="p-card reveal">
      <div class="p-num-bg">03</div>
      <div class="p-tag">Credit · Identity · Fintech</div>
      <div class="p-name">Loan Eligibility Engine</div>
      <div class="p-role">Lead PM — Workflow Design & Outcomes</div>
      <p class="p-desc">Designing credit eligibility for borrowers with no formal credit history requires deep understanding of how farmers manage money seasonally. I built the eligibility logic from scratch — balancing inclusion with repayment viability across 10 countries.</p>
      <ul class="p-out">
        <li><strong>90%</strong> loan repayment rate achieved</li>
        <li>Built on <strong>Mifos/Fineract</strong> + custom identity flows</li>
        <li><strong>Keycloak & OAuth</strong> for secure access</li>
        <li>Scaled across <strong>10 countries</strong></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="p-card reveal">
      <div class="p-num-bg">04</div>
      <div class="p-tag">Platform · ERP · Operations</div>
      <div class="p-name">Retail Operations Platform</div>
      <div class="p-role">Lead PM — ERP & Supply Chain</div>
      <p class="p-desc">Managing inventory and operations across hundreds of shops requires knowing when the system is breaking before agents do. I managed the Odoo ERP, payment integrations, and built dashboards surfacing systemic failures in real time.</p>
      <ul class="p-out">
        <li>Managed <strong>hundreds of retail locations</strong> across 10 countries in Sub Saharan Africa</li>
        <li>Analysed <strong>10,000+ Jira tickets</strong> to surface patterns</li>
        <li>Built roadmaps with T-shirt sizing <strong>2026–2028</strong></li>
        <li><strong>94%</strong> inventory migration match rate</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FIELD -->
<section class="section" id="field">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-num">05</div>
    <div class="section-title">I GO WHERE THE USERS ARE</div>
    <div class="section-label">Field Work</div>
  </div>
  <div class="field-body">
    <div class="field-left reveal-left">
      <p class="field-intro">Wave builds for people across Senegal, Côte d'Ivoire, and Uganda — feature phones, inconsistent connectivity, markets where a failed transaction ruins someone's day. I understand that world. My users have lived it.</p>
      <p class="field-pull">"If the data doesn't make sense, my first instinct is to get in front of the user — not run another query."</p>
      <div class="f-story reveal">
        <div class="f-loc">🇰🇪 Rural Kenya — Shop Agent Visits</div>
        <div class="f-title">Watching transactions fail under real pressure</div>
        <p class="f-body">Spent days at Tupande retail shops watching agents process M-Pesa transactions during peak harvest season. Saw exactly where the POS failed — timeout errors, unconfirmed payment states, confusion on retry flows. Built the new UX from those observations, not assumptions.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="f-story reveal">
        <div class="f-loc">🌾 Farmer Interviews — Input Ordering</div>
        <div class="f-title">How farmers actually think about digital money</div>
        <p class="f-body">Many of our farmers had never used e-commerce. I interviewed them directly about trust, payment anxiety, and what "confirmation" meant to them. This reshaped our order confirmation UX — SMS fallbacks, simplified receipts — all from what I heard in the field.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="f-story reveal">
        <div class="f-loc">📊 197-Person Survey — POS Reliability</div>
        <div class="f-title">Quantifying a trust crisis no one had named</div>
        <p class="f-body">When agents complained, leadership assumed minor friction. I ran a structured 197-person survey across Kenya and found a 4.7/10 trust score and widespread failures. That data became the business case for a full rebuild and an engineering warroom before peak season.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-right" id="photo-right">
      <div class="photo-frame">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Doreen reviewing app with users in the field" loading="lazy">
        <div class="photo-cap">App review with farmers · Rural Kenya</div>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-frame">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Farmer field research Kenya" loading="lazy">
        <div class="photo-cap">Farmer field research · Kenya</div>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-frame">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="User discovery session" loading="lazy">
        <div class="photo-cap">User discovery in the field</div>
      </div>
    </div
  </div>
  <div class="photo-grid" id="photo-grid" style="grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;">
    <div class="pgrid-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Shop agents at Tupande duka" loading="lazy">
      <div class="pgrid-cap">With shop agents at Tupande duka</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pgrid-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="App review in the field" loading="lazy">
      <div class="pgrid-cap">App review · Rural Kenya</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pgrid-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="User discovery session" loading="lazy">
      <div class="pgrid-cap">User discovery</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pgrid-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Field research" loading="lazy">
      <div class="pgrid-cap">Field research</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- IMPACT -->
<section class="section" id="impact">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-num">06</div>
    <div class="section-title">THE NUMBERS</div>
    <div class="section-label">Impact</div>
  </div>
  <div class="impact-grid">
    <div class="istat reveal"><div class="istat-num">4M+</div><div class="istat-lbl">Farmers Served</div></div>
    <div class="istat reveal"><div class="istat-num">10</div><div class="istat-lbl">African Countries</div></div>
    <div class="istat reveal"><div class="istat-num">$200M</div><div class="istat-lbl">Payments Managed</div></div>
    <div class="istat reveal"><div class="istat-num">9yr</div><div class="istat-lbl">African Fintech</div></div>
    <div class="istat reveal"><div class="istat-num">2.78M</div><div class="istat-lbl">USD Saved · CEO Recognised</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- AWARDS -->
<section class="section" id="awards">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-num">07</div>
    <div class="section-title">RECOGNITION</div>
    <div class="section-label">Awards</div>
  </div>
  <div class="awards-grid">
    <div class="award-card featured reveal">
      <span class="a-icon">🌾</span>
      <div class="a-title">The Farmer's Champion</div>
      <div class="a-org">One Acre Fund · Dec 2025</div>
      <p class="a-desc">Awarded by the Nairobi Social Committee for embodying the spirit of farmers first. The highest recognition of mission alignment at One Acre Fund — and exactly the mindset Wave is built on.</p>
      <div style="margin-top:24px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);background:#fff;">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="One Acre Fund Certificate of Recognition - The Farmer's Champion" style="width:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block;padding:12px;background:#fff;">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="award-card featured reveal">
      <span class="a-icon">💰</span>
      <div class="a-title">KES 2.78M Saved</div>
      <div class="a-org">CEO Recognised · One Acre Fund · 2025</div>
      <p class="a-desc">Identified critical system inefficiencies, rallied the engineering team, and drove USD 2.78M in documented cost savings — recognised directly by the CEO for the business impact.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="award-card reveal">
      <span class="a-icon">🏆</span>
      <div class="a-title">Top Agriculture App</div>
      <div class="a-org">Industry Award</div>
      <p class="a-desc">Awarded for Tupande Online — a mobile-first platform serving rural smallholder farmers with digital ordering and M-Pesa payments.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="award-card reveal">
      <span class="a-icon">📱</span>
      <div class="a-title">Best Use of Mobile for Social & Economic Development</div>
      <div class="a-org">Industry Award</div>
      <p class="a-desc">Recognised for using mobile technology to drive measurable financial inclusion outcomes for underserved farming communities across Africa.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="award-card reveal">
      <span class="a-icon">🎓</span>
      <div class="a-title">MBA — Strategic Management</div>
      <div class="a-org">USIU · 3.90 GPA</div>
      <p class="a-desc">Strategic management focus with thesis-level work on digital product growth and financial inclusion in emerging markets.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="award-card reveal" style="border-right:none;">
      <span class="a-icon">🏎️</span>
      <div class="a-title">Kenya Tarmac Racing Champion</div>
      <div class="a-org">2024</div>
      <p class="a-desc">Kenya Tarmac Racing 2024 champion. The same instinct that wins races — reading conditions fast, committing fully, no half measures — is how I approach product.</p>
      <div style="margin-top:24px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px;">
        <div style="overflow:hidden;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Kenya Tarmac Racing 2024" style="width:100%;height:200px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center center;display:block;filter:grayscale(15%);transition:transform .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),filter .4s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.06)';this.style.filter='grayscale(0%)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='scale(1)';this.style.filter='grayscale(15%)'">
        </div>
        <div style="overflow:hidden;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Kenya Tarmac Racing 2024 champion" style="width:100%;height:200px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center center;display:block;filter:grayscale(15%);transition:transform .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),filter .4s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.06)';this.style.filter='grayscale(0%)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='scale(1)';this.style.filter='grayscale(15%)'">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="section" id="contact">
  <div class="section-header" style="border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1);">
    <div class="section-num" style="border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:rgba(255,255,255,.06);">08</div>
    <div class="section-title" style="color:var(--white);">LET'S BUILD TOGETHER</div>
    <div class="section-label" style="border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1);">Connect</div>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-body">
    <div class="contact-left reveal-left">
      <div class="contact-h">READY<br>TO<br><em>SHIP.</em></div>
      <p class="contact-sub">9 years building financial infrastructure for people the system overlooked — and recognised as a Farmer's Champion for it. Wave's mission is where I want to spend the next chapter.</p>
      <div class="contact-actions">
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/doreen-sasaka-1ab3a796/" target="_blank" class="cb-primary">View LinkedIn ↗</a>
        <a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1AGIPQ9iBj0y1OGN81f-u-AmjqCmrUlqd/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank" class="cb-secondary">Download CV ↓</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-right reveal">
      <div class="contact-info">
        <div class="c-info-row">
          <div class="c-info-label">Email</div>
          <div class="c-info-val"><a id="contact-email" href="#"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="05766476646e6431456268646c692b666a68">[email&#160;protected]</span></a></div>
        </div>
        <div class="c-info-row">
          <div class="c-info-label">Location</div>
          <div class="c-info-val">Nairobi, Kenya</div>
        </div>
        <div class="c-info-row">
          <div class="c-info-label">Experience</div>
          <div class="c-info-val">9+ years African Fintech · IBM · One Acre Fund</div>
        </div>
        <div class="c-info-row">
          <div class="c-info-label">Prototype</div>
          <div class="c-info-val"><a href="https://deeoaf.github.io/acrepoint-prototype/" target="_blank" style="color:var(--orange);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3);">deeoaf.github.io/acrepoint-prototype</a></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-foot">Doreen Sasaka · Senior PM · Nairobi 2025</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
// Email
['hero-email','contact-email'].forEach(function(id){
  var el = document.getElementById(id);
  if(el){ var e='sasaka4'+String.fromCharCode(64)+'gmail.com'; el.href='mailto:'+e; el.textContent=e; }
});

// Staggered reveal
var obs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
  entries.forEach(function(entry){
    if(entry.isIntersecting){
      var delay = entry.target.dataset.delay||0;
      setTimeout(function(){ entry.target.classList.add('visible'); }, Number(delay));
      obs.unobserve(entry.target);
    }
  });
},{threshold:0.07,rootMargin:'0px 0px 40px 0px'});

document.querySelectorAll('.hstat,.step,.vision-payoff,.live-card,.fit-card,.p-card,.f-story,.istat,.award-card,.reveal,.reveal-left').forEach(function(el,i){
  var siblings = el.parentElement.children;
  var idx = Array.from(siblings).indexOf(el);
  el.dataset.delay = idx * 80;
  obs.observe(el);
});

function quickReveal(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.reveal-left,.hstat,.step,.live-card,.fit-card,.p-card,.f-story,.istat,.award-card').forEach(function(el){
    if(el.getBoundingClientRect().top < window.innerHeight+80) el.classList.add('visible');
  });
}
quickReveal(); setTimeout(quickReveal,300); setTimeout(quickReveal,700);
window.addEventListener('scroll',quickReveal,{passive:true});

// ── Count-up animation ──
function countUp(el, target, suffix, prefix, duration, isFloat) {
  var start = null;
  function ease(t){ return 1 - Math.pow(1-t, 3); }
  function step(ts) {
    if(!start) start = ts;
    var p = Math.min((ts-start)/duration, 1);
    var val = ease(p) * target;
    el.textContent = prefix + (isFloat ? val.toFixed(2) : Math.round(val)) + suffix;
    if(p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
    else el.textContent = prefix + (isFloat ? target.toFixed(2) : target) + suffix;
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(step);
}

function animateNum(el) {
  var raw = el.textContent.trim();
  if(raw==='4M+') countUp(el,4,'M+','',1300,false);
  else if(raw==='$200M') countUp(el,200,'M','$',1300,false);
  else if(raw==='90%') countUp(el,90,'%','',1100,false);
  else if(raw==='10') countUp(el,10,'','',900,false);
  else if(raw==='9yr') countUp(el,9,'yr','',1000,false);
  else if(raw==='2.78M') countUp(el,2.78,'M','',1400,true);
  else if(raw==='100K+') countUp(el,100,'K+','',1300,false);
  else if(raw==='23→96%'){
    var s=null;
    function f(ts){if(!s)s=ts;var p=Math.min((ts-s)/1600,1);var e=1-Math.pow(1-p,3);el.textContent='23→'+Math.round(23+e*73)+'%';if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(f);}
    requestAnimationFrame(f);
  }
}

var numObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
  entries.forEach(function(entry){
    if(entry.isIntersecting){
      entry.target.querySelectorAll('.istat-num,.hstat-num').forEach(function(el,i){
        setTimeout(function(){ animateNum(el); }, i*130);
      });
      numObs.unobserve(entry.target);
    }
  });
},{threshold:0.35});
document.querySelectorAll('#impact,.hero-stats').forEach(function(el){ numObs.observe(el); });

// ── Glitch hover on hero stats ──
document.querySelectorAll('.hstat').forEach(function(card){
  card.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(){
    var num = card.querySelector('.hstat-num');
    if(!num) return;
    var original = num.textContent;
    var count = 0;
    var glitch = setInterval(function(){
      if(count++ > 7){ clearInterval(glitch); num.textContent=original; return; }
      num.textContent = original.replace(/[0-9]/g, function(){ return Math.floor(Math.random()*10); });
    }, 55);
  });
});

// ── Impact section entrance bounce ──
var impactDone = false;
var bounceObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
  entries.forEach(function(entry){
    if(entry.isIntersecting && !impactDone){
      impactDone = true;
      document.querySelectorAll('.istat').forEach(function(el,i){
        setTimeout(function(){
          el.style.transform='scale(1.05)';
          setTimeout(function(){ el.style.transform='scale(1)'; },350);
        }, i*100);
      });
    }
  });
},{threshold:0.5});
var imp = document.getElementById('impact');
if(imp) bounceObs.observe(imp);
</script>
</body>
</html>
